ddls:
CREATE TABLE "earthquakes" (
  "earthquake_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earthquake */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the earthquake */,
  "time_utc" TEXT /* Time of the earthquake in UTC */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude where the earthquake occurred */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude where the earthquake occurred */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the earthquake in kilometers */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the earthquake */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of seismic event */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "processing_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data processing method */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty associated with the measurements */,
  "richter_scale" REAL /* Magnitude on the Richter scale */,
  "moment_magnitude" REAL /* Moment magnitude of the earthquake */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the seismic event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earthquake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seismic_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seismic station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the seismic station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the seismic station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the seismic station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the station */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used */,
  "data_frequency" REAL /* Frequency at which data is collected */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "earthquake_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of seismic event */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the seismic event type (e.g., earthquake, aftershock) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Broad category of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., USGS, IRIS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the source information */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format in which data is provided */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_data" (
  "event_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event data record */,
  "earthquake_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the earthquake it is associated with */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seismic station recording the event */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the event as recorded */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the event in kilometers */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recording */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality assessment of the recorded data */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a specific sensor within the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_data_earthquake_id FOREIGN KEY ("earthquake_id") REFERENCES earthquakes ("earthquake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES seismic_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "earthquake_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the earthquake associated with the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., green, yellow, red) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "issued_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was issued */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert */,
  "response_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a response is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_earthquake_id FOREIGN KEY ("earthquake_id") REFERENCES earthquakes ("earthquake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "lead_researcher" TEXT /* Lead researcher for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the project ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_lead_researcher FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "earthquake_id" INTEGER /* ID of the earthquake being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or application used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_earthquake_id FOREIGN KEY ("earthquake_id") REFERENCES earthquakes ("earthquake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the processing method (e.g., FFT, PCA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the processing method */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Specific algorithm used within the method */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software used for processing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
